name: 3pk Easter Polyresin Bird in Egg Shell - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of whimsy to your Easter decor with this charming 3pk Easter Polyresin Bird in Egg Shell - Spritz™. Each piece is crafted with attention to detail, showcasing vibrant colors that brighten any indoor space. Standing at 4.25 inches tall, these delightful figurines are perfect for tabletops or shelves, adding a playful element to your seasonal decorations. Enjoy the cheerful presence of these multicolored birds in your home.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
